steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The subject “The vest frottoir” is singular. The blank contains a linking verb that connects the subject to its complement, “a wearable washboard that is played by rubbing spoons or bottle openers against it.”

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires a verb to match its subject in number. Is (choice B) is singular and matches the singular subject. The other choices are all plural forms and violate subject-verb agreement. That matches choice B — B is correct.
